page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.u2i-c1m4.6xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance belonging to the ecs.u2i server family. It is built on the x86_64 architecture and powered by an Intel Xeon processor operating at a clock speed of 2.7 GHz. The instance features 24 dedicated physical cores with a single thread per core, resulting in 24 vCPUs. It is equipped with 96.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced allocation of 4.0 GB of RAM per core.

This instance utilizes the KVM hypervisor to deliver virtualization. It does not include any bundled local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met through external block storage volumes. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline network bandwidth of 12 Gbps. The instance does not include any complimentary public IPv4 addresses or GPU hardware accelerators.

With a 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, the ecs.u2i-c1m4.6xlarge offers a balanced resource density suitable for general-purpose workloads. The dedicated CPU allocation ensures consistent processing capabilities without resource contention. This configuration is appropriate for application servers, web serving, mid-sized databases, and enterprise applications that require a steady balance of compute and memory without the need for local NVMe storage or specialized GPU acceleration.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.u2i-c1m4.6xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance within the ecs.u2i family, running on the KVM hypervisor. It features an x86_64 architecture powered by an Intel Xeon processor running at 2.7 GHz. The instance provides 24 dedicated physical cores with one thread per core, yielding 24 vCPUs, alongside 96.0 GB of RAM, which establishes a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-memory ratio. It does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, relying instead on external network storage. Network performance is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 12 Gbps. This resource profile makes the instance well-suited for general-purpose workloads, including web serving, application servers, and moderate database deployments requiring consistent, dedicated CPU performance.

tagline: A balanced general-purpose virtual server featuring twenty-four dedicated Intel Xeon cores, ninety-six gigabytes of memory, and twelve gigabits network bandwidth.
